1983 • DULUTH, MINNESOTA
OWNER'S OFFICE
1983 · Week 1

Sandra

Former sports reporter.
Boss, welcome to Duluth. We have loyal fans, a leaking roof, one superstar who hates buses, and a mascot listed as day-to-day.

Monday Briefing

Sandra has three problems on her notepad. Pick your way through the week.

Lumberjacks vs Boise Bats

The arena floor is dry. For now.

DULUTH DAILY DISPATCH

LUMBERJACKS OPEN ANOTHER SEASON OF BAD IDEAS

Sandra says the phones are already ringing. She has declined to say whether that is good.

The People

The Lumberjacks are not a roster. They are recurring problems with shoes.

Everything memorable gets filed. Sandra forgets nothing.

Storylines

RoadRunner Coach Lines

Randy Malone has developed a public feud with Duluth's cheapest transport option. This is not going away.

Woody Watch

Mascot health remains unstable. Sandra keeps spare incident forms in the top drawer.
